sentences.arabic: زَارَتْ مَرْيَمُ سُوقَ الْمَدِينَةِ الْقَدِيمَةِ مَعَ أُخْتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Merjem je posjetila staru gradsku pijacu sa sestrom.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam visited the old city market with her sister.

sentences.arabic: رَأَتَا أَشْيَاءَ كَثِيرَةً وَجَمِيلَةً فِي السُّوقِ.
sentences.translation: Vidjele su mnogo lijepih stvari na pijaci.
sentences.translationEn: They saw many beautiful things in the market.

sentences.translation: Merjem je kupila mali poklon za svoju majku.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam bought a small gift for her mother.

sentences.translation: Vratile su se u hotel uvečer zadovoljne.
sentences.translationEn: They returned to the hotel in the evening feeling happy.
